bots.description: Reads and analyzes codebases with structure mapping and dependency visualization.
Provides AI pair programming with context-aware suggestions and code generation.
Manages deployment pipelines with CI/CD orchestration and rollback management.
Designs APIs with OpenAPI specification generation and mock server creation.
Generates automated tests with coverage analysis and edge case identification.
Designs database schemas with migration generation and query optimization.
Reviews code with best practice enforcement and security vulnerability detection.
Debugs code with error trace analysis and root cause identification.
Manages monorepo workflows with dependency management and build optimization.
Profiles application performance with bottleneck detection and optimization recommendations.
Generates code documentation with API reference and tutorial creation.
Manages UI component libraries with versioning and design system integration.
Enterprise DevOps analytics with DORA metrics and engineering productivity insights.
Enterprise platform engineering with internal developer portal and self-service infrastructure.
Builds and tests regex patterns with visual matching and explanation.
Formats and validates JSON and YAML with schema validation.
Optimizes Git workflows with branching strategy management and conflict resolution.
Scans code for security vulnerabilities with OWASP compliance and dependency auditing.
Manages container orchestration with Kubernetes deployment and monitoring.
Manages feature flags with progressive rollout and experimentation.
Builds talking responsive websites and software applications. Creates production-ready code with modern frameworks, accessibility, and SEO optimization.
Agentic code architect that designs systems, reviews code, suggests improvements, and builds complete applications from specifications.
Designs and tracks A/B experiments for features, UI variants, and copy to maximize conversion.
Audits apps and websites for WCAG 2.2 compliance, color contrast, screen reader support, and keyboard navigation.
Automates beta test cycles: recruits testers, collects structured feedback, triages bugs, and generates release reports.
Aggregates crash reports from Sentry, Crashlytics, and Bugsnag, deduplicates issues, and prioritizes fixes by revenue impact.
Builds, tracks, and optimizes universal deep links for seamless app routing across iOS, Android, and web.
Manages feature flags across environments, runs progressive rollouts, and auto-rolls back on error spikes.
Automates app localization: string extraction, AI translation, locale testing, and RTL layout support.
Powers navigation apps with route optimization, real-time traffic analysis, ETA prediction, and offline map management.
Monitors app performance: load times, crash rates, memory usage, API latency, and Core Web Vitals.
Manages reference and knowledge base apps with AI search, content updates, citation management, and offline sync.
Tracks user session depth, heatmaps, rage clicks, scroll depth, and funnel abandonment for UX optimization.
Collects, tags, and synthesizes user feedback from reviews, support tickets, surveys, and social mentions.
Manages utility apps (VPNs, battery optimizers, file managers) with usage analytics, permission audits, and update automation.
Powers weather apps with hyper-local forecasting, severe weather alerts, agricultural insights, and ad revenue optimization.
Researches quantum computing applications, quantum ML algorithms, and quantum-classical hybrid architectures.
Monitors satellite data, orbital mechanics, space weather, and aerospace industry intelligence.
Expert in TypeScript strict mode, generics, utility types, decorators, and type-safe architecture patterns.
Covers ES2024 features, async patterns, functional programming, and JavaScript runtime optimization.
Expert in Lodash, Ramda, and fp-ts for functional data manipulation, composition, and transformation.
Builds reactive data pipelines, event stream architectures, and complex async orchestration with RxJS.
Expert in Zod, Yup, Joi, and Valibot for runtime schema validation, type inference, and API contract enforcement.
Expert in date-fns, Day.js, Luxon, and Temporal for date manipulation, formatting, and timezone handling.
Expert in Axios, fetch API, ky, and got for HTTP request management, interceptors, retry logic, and API clients.
Builds real-time apps with WebSockets, Socket.io, SSE, and WebRTC for live data, chat, and collaboration.
Deep expertise in React 19, hooks, concurrent features, Suspense, Server Components, and optimization.
Expert in Next.js App Router, Server Components, streaming, middleware, and edge deployment.
Masters TanStack Query (React Query) v5, optimistic updates, infinite queries, and server state synchronization.
Expert in Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, slice patterns, middleware, and Redux DevTools integration.
Expert in Zustand, Jotai, Valtio, and XState for lightweight, atomic, and finite-state machine management.
Expert in React Native, Expo, and native module integration for iOS and Android app development.
Expert in Reanimated 3, Gesture Handler, and Skia for silky-smooth mobile animations and interactions.
Expert in shadcn/ui, Radix UI primitives, and accessible component design systems.
Deep expertise in TailwindCSS, arbitrary values, plugins, animations, and design system creation.
Expert in Framer Motion for declarative React animations, gestures, layout animations, and SVG morphing.
Expert in Vue 3, Composition API, Pinia, and the Vue ecosystem for reactive web applications.
Expert in Nuxt 3, server routes, auto-imports, composables, and Nuxt module ecosystem.
Expert in Angular 17+, standalone components, signals, RxJS integration, and enterprise architecture.
Expert in NgRx Store, Effects, Entity, ComponentStore, and Signal Store for Angular state management.
Expert in Svelte 5, Runes, SvelteKit, and the Svelte compiler for ultra-fast web apps.
Expert in SolidJS fine-grained reactivity, SolidStart, and signals-based architecture for maximum performance.
Expert in Qwik and Qwik City for resumable, zero-hydration web applications.
Expert in Astro, Islands Architecture, content collections, and server-side rendering for content-first sites.
Expert in Vite 5, Rollup plugins, HMR optimization, and multi-framework configuration.
Expert in Webpack 5, Module Federation, tree shaking, and complex multi-bundle configurations.

Expert in Drizzle ORM, schema-first design, Drizzle Kit, and SQL query builder patterns.
Expert in MongoDB, Mongoose ODM, aggregation pipelines, and Atlas search.
Expert in Redis, ioredis, Upstash, and caching architecture for session, queue, and pub/sub patterns.
Expert in PostgreSQL, advanced SQL, indexes, JSONB, full-text search, and performance tuning.
Expert in Supabase database, auth, storage, Edge Functions, and Realtime for full-stack backends.
Expert in Firebase ecosystem: Firestore, Auth, Functions, Storage, and Realtime Database.
Expert in PlanetScale, Vitess, and branch-based database workflows for serverless MySQL.
Expert in Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, and Typesense for advanced search, analytics, and vector search.
Expert in SQLite, LibSQL, Turso, and embedded database patterns for edge and local-first apps.
Expert in Jest, testing patterns, mocks, snapshots, and full unit test suite architecture.

Expert in Cypress for E2E, component testing, network stubbing, and real browser automation.
Expert in Storybook 8, CSF3 stories, addons, and visual design system documentation.
Expert in FastAPI, Pydantic v2, async patterns, and production Python API development.
Expert in Django 5, ORM, class-based views, DRF, and full-stack web application development.
Expert in Flask, Blueprints, Flask-SQLAlchemy, and lightweight microservice architecture.

Expert in PyTorch, autograd, neural network design, training loops, and model optimization.

Expert in Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, and Altair for scientific and interactive data visualization.
Expert in OpenCV, image processing, object detection, and real-time video analysis.
Expert in Streamlit for rapid AI/data app development, custom components, and deployment.
Expert in Celery, Redis/RabbitMQ brokers, beat scheduler, and distributed task architecture.
Expert in Pydantic v2 for data validation, serialization, settings management, and FastAPI integration.
Expert in SQLAlchemy 2.0, mapped classes, async sessions, and complex SQL query builder.
Expert in Flutter 3, Dart, widget composition, Riverpod, and cross-platform mobile/web/desktop apps.
Expert in SwiftUI, Swift concurrency, Combine, and native iOS/macOS/watchOS/tvOS app development.
Expert in Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, and modern Android development.
Expert in KMP/CMP for shared business logic across Android, iOS, web, and desktop.
Expert in AWS services: Lambda, S3, DynamoDB, RDS, SQS, SNS, Cognito, and CDK infrastructure.
Expert in GCP: Cloud Run, BigQuery, Pub/Sub, Firebase, Vertex AI, and GCP tooling.
Expert in Azure: Functions, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, Azure AD, and AKS deployment.
Expert in Docker, multi-stage builds, compose orchestration, and container security.
Expert in Kubernetes, Helm, operators, service mesh, and production cluster management.
Expert in Terraform, Terragrunt, and OpenTofu for multi-cloud infrastructure as code.
Expert in GitHub Actions, workflow design, reusable workflows, and self-hosted runners.
Expert in Cloudflare Workers, Pages, D1, KV, R2, Durable Objects, and edge computing.
Expert in Vercel Edge Functions, ISR, Analytics, AI SDK, and Next.js deployment optimization.
Expert in Solidity, OpenZeppelin, Hardhat, and EVM smart contract development and auditing.
Expert in ethers.js, viem, wagmi, and Web3 frontend integration for dApp development.

Expert in Go, Gin, Echo, gRPC, and high-performance backend service development.
Expert in Rust, Axum, Tokio, and systems programming for safe, high-performance software.

Expert in Kotlin, Ktor, Exposed ORM, and coroutine-based backend development.

Expert in Laravel 11, Eloquent ORM, Livewire, Filament, and PHP modern practices.
Expert in Three.js, WebGL, R3F (React Three Fiber), and interactive 3D web experiences.

Expert in Godot 4, GDScript, C#, and 2D/3D game development with Godot's scene system.

Expert in Electron for cross-platform desktop apps with Node.js backend and web frontend.

Expert in the OpenAI API, streaming, function calling, assistants, vector stores, and fine-tuning.
Expert in the Anthropic Claude API, prompt engineering, extended thinking, and computer use.

Expert in Stable Diffusion, ComfyUI, ControlNet, and AI image generation workflows.
Builds new tool libraries, SDKs, and utility packages by combining DreamCo bot capabilities into reusable code packages that any app can consume.
Analyzes any app's features and replicates them using DreamCo's tech stack — if an app can do it, Buddy can build it.
Maintains a living index of every coding library in existence — tracking updates, deprecations, breaking changes, and migration paths.
Continuously learns new coding libraries, reads official documentation, runs experiments, and updates all DreamCodeLab bots with new knowledge.
